title: CloudFormation migration remediation for auth routing + user pool schema
description: Recover and redeploy cloud auth/token changes safely in existing us-east-1 stack by handling API Gateway variable route migration ordering and Cognito UserPool schema immutability constraints.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Progress: Migration remediation task created from live deploy failure evidence.
Evidence: us-east-1 deploy failed with ApiGateway variable-sibling conflict and UserPool schema immutability; stack stuck UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED.
Next: execute continue-update-rollback, then apply migration-safe two-step template strategy and redeploy.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED on IAM permission for cloudformation:ContinueUpdateRollback on KanbusCloudFoundation.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented migration-oriented CDK route patch locally (root proxy split to explicit assets/auth + tenant route resources) and revalidated synth/tests.
Evidence: infra/cloud tests pass and cdk synth passes after patch; deploy still blocked because existing stack must be recovered first and legacy route must be removed in a staged update.
Next: after rollback permission is granted, run staged deployment sequence in us-east-1.
Risk/Blocker: blocked on ContinueUpdateRollback IAM permission.
